transcript: Speaker A: এই সিনটা ইংরেজিতে কিভাবে বলবে? [How would you say this scene in English?] Speaker B: Man is making food fastly. Speaker C: এটা পুরোপুরি ভুল না কিন্তু একটু বেটার এভাবে বলা যায়: "An energetic vendor aggressively mixes various ingredients into a snack with high-intensity movements." [This is not completely wrong, but a bit better way to say it is: "An energetic vendor aggressively mixes various ingredients into a snack with high-intensity movements."] Speaker B: ওহ আচ্ছা আচ্ছা। আমার ইংলিশ ভালো আসে না। [Oh, I see. My English is not very good.] Speaker C: কোনো ব্যাপার না। AI Teacher ট্রাই করেছো? [No problem. Have you tried the AI Teacher?] Speaker B: কিন্তু এগুলো এক্সপেন্সিভ হবে না? [But won't these be expensive?] Speaker C: একদম না। নরমাল ইংলিশ ক্লাসেসের থেকে ৭ গুণ সস্তা। তাই ৫০ লাখ মানুষ MySivi-তে ইংলিশ প্র্যাকটিস করছে। [Not at all. It's 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: কিন্তু টাইম পাই না। [But I don't get time.] Speaker C: প্রতিদিন শুধু ১৫-২০ মিনিট প্র্যাকটিস করলেই যথেষ্ট। ধীরে ধীরে তুমি ফ্লুয়েন্টলি ইংলিশ বলতে শুরু করবে। [Just practicing 15-20 minutes daily is enough. Gradually you will start speaking English fluently.] Speaker B: ওয়াও! কিভাবে জয়েন করবো? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker C: ইনস্টল বাটনে ক্লিক করো, MySivi অ্যাপ ইনস্টল করো, সাইন আপ করো আর প্র্যাকটিস শুরু করো। শুধু ১৫ দিনের মধ্যেই ইম্প্রুভমেন্ট দেখা যাবে। এখনই শুরু করো। [Click on the install button, install the MySivi app, sign up, and start practicing. Improvement can be seen in just 15 days. Start now.]
on_screen_text: EI SCENE-TA KIBHABE BOLBE [How to say this scene], MAN IS MAKING FOOD FASTLY, ETA PUROPURI BHUL NA KINTU EKTU BETTER EVABE BOLA JAY [This is not completely wrong but a bit better can be said like this], AN ENERGETIC VENDOR AGGRESSIVELY MIXES VARIOUS INGREDIENTS INTO A SNACK WITH HIGH-INTENSITY MOVEMENTS, OHH ACCHA ACCHA [Oh I see], AMAR ENGLISH BHALO ASHE NA [My English is not good], KONO BYAPAR NA [No problem], AI TEACHER TRY KORECHO? [Have you tried AI Teacher?], KINTU EGULO EXPENSIVE HOBE NA? [But won't these be expensive?], EKDOM NA [Not at all], NORMAL ENGLISH CLASSES-ER THEKE 7X CHEAPER [7x cheaper than normal English classes], TAI 50 LAKH MANUSH MYSIVI-TE ENGLISH PRACTICE KORCHE [So 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi], KINTU TIME PAI NA [But I don't get time], PROTIDIN SHUDHU 15-20 MINUTE PRACTICE KORLEI JOTESHTHO [Just practicing 15-20 minutes daily is enough], DHIRE DHIRE TUMI FLUENTLY ENGLISH SHURU KORBE [Gradually you will start speaking English fluently], WOW, KIBHABE JOIN KORBO [How to join], INSTALL BUTTON-E CLICK KORO [Click on install button], MYSIVI APP INSTALL KORO [Install MySivi app], SIGN UP KORO [Sign up], AR PRACTICE SHURU KORO [And start practicing], SHUDHU 15 DINER MODHYEI IMPROVEMENT DEKHA JABE [Improvement can be seen in just 15 days], EKHONI SHURU KORO [Start now], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A Bengali speaker learns how to describe a street food scene in advanced English using an AI avatar. The ad highlights MySivi as an affordable, quick daily practice tool that shows results in 15 days. It ends with a call-to-action to install the app.
